subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him and that this Youth is indeed He Who speaketh in all things, declaring: "There is none other God but Me." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و ان هذا الغلام لهو الذی ینطق فیکل شیء بانه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
